versions.changelog: Added city, suburb, and neighborhood labels across the OKC metro bbox. Thinned neighborhood labels from 67 to 25 features by deduping OSM plat artifacts and enforcing a 600 m minimum spacing between kept features; survivors include Bricktown, Midtown OKC, Wheeler District, Heritage Hills East, Asian District, Mesta Park, and Jefferson Park. Added country:US metadata to config.

Initial release. 378,004 buildings from five sources (Overture, OKC City 2020 aerial servey, FEMA/ORNL, Microsoft, OSM). High-quality LODES demand data with pre-calculated routes. Includes Will Rogers World Airport (OKC), 7 universities, Tinker AFB, and entertainment venues.
